headline: 3 Stocks in Focus That Declared Dividend Hikes Amid Ongoing Volatility
summary: CF, LEVI and PNC declared dividend hikes amid market volatility, offering income-focused investors options amid AI sell-offs and renewed geopolitical tensions.

headline: CF Industries: Iran War Beneficiary, 20% Dividend Hike, But Rally Requires Caution
summary: CF Industries Holdings has surged 49% YTD, driven by tight global nitrogen supply amid ongoing geopolitical tensions. Learn why CF stock is a hold.
